data.summary: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement for read-state tracking of in-app style notifications.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement for read-state tracking for in-app style notifications. However, the evidence provided does not include any specific data or API reads that confirm this requirement is satisfied. The linked use case mentions the need for read-state tracking, but there is no concrete evidence available to demonstrate that this requirement is met, indicating a gap in the validation process.
gaps: No evidence provided to confirm the presence of read-state tracking for in-app style notifications.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify the read-state tracking requirement.
